channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Threatens Iran as Middle East Tensions Surge
item.description: President Trump has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or face renewed war, as an emboldened Israel weighs its next moves. The administration is pushing for a deal while military options remain on the table.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Prices Drop Over 2% After Trump Delays Iran Attack
item.description: Global oil prices fell more than 2% in early Asian trade after President Trump announced he had paused a planned military strike on Iran. The delay signals potential de-escalation and revived hopes for diplomatic negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Putin Visits China to Reaffirm Russia Ties as Xi Seeks Stable US Relations
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin is traveling to China to meet with Chinese leader Xi Jinping. The visit comes less than a week after the Trump-Xi summit, as Beijing balances its partnership with Moscow against improving ties with Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇿🇦 Trump Moves to Admit 10,000 More White South Africans as Refugees
item.description: The Trump administration argues that an "emergency refugee situation" in South Africa merits bringing more Afrikaners to America, at an estimated cost of some $100 million. Critics call the move politically motivated.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Deploying Unmanned Aircraft Equipped with Airborne Systems
item.description: Japan is deploying unmanned aircraft equipped with advanced airborne systems to enhance its defense capabilities amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Hegseth Campaigns for Congressional Race, Breaking with Pentagon Neutrality
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is campaigning for a Trump-backed candidate in Kentucky, breaking with the traditional Pentagon stance of political neutrality in elections.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia's New Armaments Aim to Defend Sovereignty, Says Prabowo
item.description: Indonesian Defense Minister Prabowo Subianto says the country's new military acquisitions are aimed at defending national sovereignty and strengthening defense capabilities.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇦 US Pulls Back from Joint Defence Board with Canada Amid Growing Tensions
item.description: The United States has pulled back from a joint defense board with Canada, signaling growing tensions in the bilateral relationship between the North American allies.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Good Chance of Iran Nuclear Deal After Delaying Strike
item.description: President Donald Trump said there was a "very good chance" the United States could reach an agreement with Iran to prevent Tehran from obtaining a nuclear weapon, hours after saying he had postponed a planned military attack.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Active Shooter Situation Reported at Islamic Center in San Diego
item.description: Mayor reported an active shooter situation at an Islamic center in San Diego. Details remain limited as authorities respond to the incident.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Belarus Holds Nuclear Weapons Drills, Defence Ministry Says
item.description: Belarus is conducting nuclear weapons drills, according to the defense ministry, amid heightened tensions with neighboring countries and the ongoing conflict in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Earthquake Hits Southwest China, Thousands Evacuate as Buildings Collapse
item.description: An earthquake struck southwest China, forcing thousands to evacuate as buildings collapsed. Rescue operations are underway in the affected region.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇪🇺 Polish PM Says Transatlantic Unity Must Survive Difficult Period
item.description: Poland's Prime Minister emphasized that transatlantic unity between Europe and the United States must survive the current difficult period in diplomatic relations.

item.title: 💰 Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against OpenAI, as the court ruled on the legal battle over the artificial intelligence company's direction and governance.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Dismisses Lawsuit Against IRS, Court Filing Shows
item.description: President Trump has dismissed his lawsuit against the IRS, according to court filings, marking a shift in his legal battles with the federal agency.

item.title: 💊 Trump to Announce Discount Drug Pricing Expansion, White House Official Says
item.description: President Trump is set to announce an expansion of discount drug pricing, according to a White House official, as part of efforts to reduce healthcare costs for Americans.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Hegseth Steps Away from War Duties to Campaign Against Trump Foe
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is stepping away from his war duties to campaign against a political opponent of President Trump, raising questions about military leadership neutrality.

item.title: 🦠 US Moves to Curb Ebola Risk, Says Immediate Risk to Public is Low
item.description: The United States is moving to curb Ebola risk, with health officials stating the immediate risk to the public remains low as they monitor potential cases.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇦🇪 Iran-US-UAE Nuclear Drones: Regional Escalation Concerns
item.description: Tensions continue in the Middle East as Iran, the US, and UAE navigate nuclear and drone-related concerns, with regional allies intercepting hostile drone attacks from Iran.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇦 US-Canada Defence Advisory Board: Tensions Rise Between Allies
item.description: The United States and Canada are experiencing tensions over their long-standing defence relationship, with questions about the future of bilateral military cooperation.

item.title: 🇬🇱 US-Greenland Talks: Progress Made But Island Not for Sale
item.description: US and Greenland officials held talks about the territory's future, with progress reported but Greenland's government firmly stating the island is not for sale.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria to Join G7 Finance Talks in Paris in Sign of Growing Status
item.description: Syria will take part in a closed-door session with G7 finance ministers and central bank governors in Paris, a sign of its growing status less than two years after the ousting of Bashar al-Assad.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Declares First Homegrown Guided Aerial Bomb Combat Ready
item.description: Ukraine has declared its first domestically produced guided aerial bomb combat ready, marking a significant milestone in the country's defense industry capabilities.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Commits to \$17 Billion Annual US Farm Purchases
item.description: China has committed to buying at least \$17 billion of US agricultural products annually in addition to soybeans for three years, following the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 China as Global Focal Point: Putin Pins Hopes on Xi Summit
item.description: As Putin visits China, Beijing is becoming the focal point for global diplomacy, with Russia pinning its hopes on the Xi-Putin summit amid shifting US-China relations.
